audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at L437 reads a fresh live balance and the only call between it and the transfer at L444 is `_getAssetOutAmount`, which is an `internal view` function that makes no ERC20 state changes (only reads a Chainlink oracle via `latestRoundData`). The reentrancy guard (`s_entered`) is set before any external call and prevents any re-entry from the post-transfer callback, closing the only plausible window for concurrent balance draining.
